kamloops.title: Southern B.C. to face highest wildfire potential over the next 48 hours
kamloops.description: The Ainslie Creek and Brunswick Creek wildfires along Highway 1 have collectively grown to nearly 20,000 hectares and are still considered out of control.

southeast.title: Southern B.C. to face highest wildfire potential over the next 48 hours

all.title: Canada wildfire smoke blankets US skies across the Midwest and Northeast, triggering health alerts
all.description: Air quality levels are forecast to drop to unhealthy levels across the U.S. Midwest and Northeast on Tuesday as smoke from Canadian wildfires intensifies. AirNow’s Fire and Smoke Map showed the regions blanketed in yellow due to the drifting smoke. Winds from the northwest are pushing smoke into the region, with National Weather Service forecasters […]

all.title: B.C. pilot killed in crash while battling Colorado wildfire
all.description: 'Today, we mourn the loss of Nicholas Dale, who gave his life while supporting response efforts on the Gold Mountain Fire,' Colorado Congressman Jeff Hurd posted on X.
